overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a rustic wooden cabin, exiting into an overcast wilderness environment, encountering a wolf, and navigating through a waterfall and along a rocky riverbank toward a distant bridge with snow-capped mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic log cabin interior with bedroom, bathroom, and kitchen areas

events.description: character moves through the kitchen and approaches the door leading to the exterior wooden porch

agents.ego_description: navigating through the cabin rooms, moving from the bedroom through the bathroom and laundry area toward the kitchen exit

entered.detail: rustic wooden bed with green bedding in the main bedroom
small wooden bedside table with items on it
wooden vanity with sink and mirror in the bathroom
white porcelain toilet in the bathroom corner
white bathtub with shower curtain in the bathroom
white washing machine in the laundry area
white kitchen cabinets and counters in the kitchen area
wooden deck visible through the open doorway at the end of the kitchen

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the interior of a rustic log cabin, passing from a bedroom with wooden furniture through a bathroom and laundry area, heading toward the kitchen exit. The space features wooden walls and floors throughout, with natural light filtering through curtained windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with red wooden cabin and wildflower meadows

events.description: character exits the cabin onto the wooden porch and descends into the overcast outdoor environment
a wolf emerges from the bushes and runs past the character near the waterfall approach

agents.ego_description: sprinting away from the cabin through grassy terrain dotted with wildflowers, heading toward a distant waterfall

notable_agents.action: wolf emerges from bushes and runs past the character toward the left

entered.detail: red wooden exterior walls of the cabin with green window trim
wooden porch with railings that the character runs down
tall evergreen trees surrounding the clearing
yellow and white wildflowers growing in the grassy meadow
waterfall visible in the distance between the trees

segments.scene_description: The character bursts out of the cabin onto a wooden porch and runs through an overcast forest clearing. The red cabin exterior is visible to the left as the character sprints through grass and wildflowers toward a distant waterfall, while a wolf suddenly emerges from the bushes and runs past.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall pool with rocky shoreline and mist

events.description: character enters the shallow water at the base of the waterfall
character walks directly through the falling water curtain to the other side

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through the waterfall pool, walking through the falling water and emerging on the rocky shore beyond

entered.detail: large cascading waterfall flowing down a rocky cliff face
steep rock face with water streaming down
shallow pool at the base of the waterfall with visible rocks beneath
distant mountain range with snow visible on the peaks

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the pool at the base of a large waterfall, walking through the falling water curtain. The scene features mist and spray from the cascade, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background beyond the rocky cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with distant bridge and mountain vistas

events.description: character leaves the waterfall pool behind and follows the river downstream along the rocky bank
a wooden bridge becomes visible spanning the river ahead as the character rounds the bend

agents.ego_description: following the rocky riverbank downstream toward a wooden bridge, with snow-capped mountains visible in the background

entered.detail: wooden truss bridge spanning the river in the distance
utility poles with power lines running parallel to the river
rocky and uneven shoreline along the flowing river

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the rocky riverbank downstream, leaving the waterfall behind. The terrain is uneven with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation. A wooden bridge becomes visible in the distance spanning the river, with power lines running along the left side and majestic snow-capped mountains filling the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate interior of a rustic cabin into a vast, overcast wilderness. It begins by moving through the wooden halls of a log cabin, passing from a bedroom through a laundry area and toward the kitchen exit. As the character bursts through the door, the scene opens onto a wooden porch and a forest clearing where the camera sprints through grass and wildflowers, passing a red cabin exterior and a wolf emerging from the brush. The movement then carries the character toward a distant waterfall, shifting from the open field into the mist and spray of the cascade. Finally, the camera pushes through the falling water curtain into a rocky pool, revealing towering snow-capped mountains in the far distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rugged riverbank that gradually opens up to reveal a vast mountain vista. It begins by moving downstream away from the mist of a waterfall, navigating across uneven terrain marked by scattered rocks and sparse vegetation. As the camera advances, the perspective expands to reveal a wooden bridge spanning the river in the distance. The scene then shifts focus toward the horizon, where power lines trace the left side of the path before the view fully opens to majestic snow-capped mountains filling the background.
